title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Weeks 4-6: The Road of Trials – Incre
content:
✔ Weeks 4-6: The Road of Trials – Increasingly difficult skill checks, first encounters with mini-bosses, growing alliances/rivalries.
✔ Weeks 7-9: The Abyss & The Moment of Doubt – XP choices become more critical, major betrayals/sacrifices become possible.
✔ Week 10: The Climax – The Betrayal, The Rebellion, The Breaking Point.
✔ Weeks 11-12: The Aftermath – Consequences of the climax, rebuilding alliances, preparing for the final battle.
✔ Weeks 13-15: The Final Reckoning – The Final Trial, The True Ending, The Literary Boss Gauntlet.

📜 Why Week 10 for the Climax?
✔ The natural midpoint-climax of a 15-week structure.
✔ A major shift in power dynamics before the final trials begin.
✔ Encourages players to commit to their chosen path before the endgame.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 274 (chunk 274/555)
